title: Agent Run Loop Execution
description: Core execution loop: agent receives input, calls LLM, processes output, iterates turns until final output, handoff, or interruption.
use_cases: Resume interrupted run (pass RunState as input)
Receive lifecycle hooks callbacks (on_agent_start, on_agent_end, on_llm_start, on_llm_end, on_tool_start, on_tool_end, on_handoff)
Trace run with spans (task_span, agent_span, turn_span)
actor_use_case_associations: Developer → Run agent in streaming mode
Runner → delegates all use cases to AgentRunner via DEFAULT_AGENT_RUNNER
AgentRunner → Load conversation history from Session
AgentRunner → Save conversation history to Session
AgentRunner → Call LLM for current agent
AgentRunner → Execute handoff to next agent
AgentRunner → Interrupt run for tool approval
LLM / Model → Call LLM for current agent

methods: async run(starting_agent, input, *, context, max_turns, hooks, run_config, error_handlers, previous_response_id, auto_previous_response_id, conversation_id, session) -> RunResult

AgentRunner.core_loop: while True loop in AgentRunner.run: increments current_turn, calls run_single_turn, dispatches on next_step

RunState.note: Passed as input to resume an interrupted run

variants: NextStepRunAgain — re-run loop with tool results appended
NextStepFinalOutput(output) — terminate loop, run output guardrails, return RunResult
NextStepInterruption(interruptions) — pause for tool approval, return interrupted RunResult

SingleStepResult.fields: original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, processed_response

run_loop_flow: 1. Developer calls Runner.run / run_sync / run_streamed with starting_agent + input
2. Runner delegates to AgentRunner.run (DEFAULT_AGENT_RUNNER)
3. AgentRunner normalizes input: str → list[TResponseInputItem]; handles RunState resume
4. If session: load history via session.get_items(); merge with current input
5. Validate session vs server-managed conversation settings (mutually exclusive)
6. Create RunState (if fresh) or restore from RunState (if resumed)
7. Start TraceCtxManager (task_span)
8. BEGIN WHILE TRUE LOOP:
8a. Turn 0 only: run input guardrails (sequential blocking, then parallel with model_task)
8b. Bind agent, prepare sandbox, resolve all tools & handoffs
8c. Increment current_turn; if current_turn > max_turns → MaxTurnsExceeded or error_handler
8d. Start turn_span tracing
8e. Call run_single_turn (→ LLM call, get ModelResponse)
8f. process_model_response → classify output into ProcessedResponse (tools / handoffs / text)
8g. Call execute_tools_and_side_effects:
- _execute_tool_plan: run function tools, computer tools, shell tools, MCP tools
- Check interruptions (tool approval required) → NextStepInterruption → pause & return
- If handoffs → execute_handoffs → NextStepHandoff
- If tool_use_behavior=stop_on_first_tool → NextStepFinalOutput from tool results
- If no tools remaining and has text output → NextStepFinalOutput
- Else → NextStepRunAgain
8h. Dispatch on next_step:
- NextStepRunAgain: append tool results to input, continue loop
- NextStepHandoff: update current_agent, fire on_handoff hooks, continue loop
- NextStepFinalOutput: run output guardrails, save to session, return RunResult
- NextStepInterruption: freeze RunState, return interrupted RunResult for approval
9. On resume: resolve_interrupted_turn replays approved/rejected tool results, then continues
key_relationships: AgentRunner calls run_single_turn → LLM (model call per turn)
RunState stores current Agent, turn count, generated items, model responses
RunHooks observes AgentRunner (event callbacks injected at runtime)
InputGuardrail checks input before turn 0 LLM call
error_handling: MaxTurnsExceeded: raised when current_turn > max_turns; interceptable via error_handlers['max_turns']
InputGuardrailTripwireTriggered: raised on blocked input; persists session items before raise
OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered: raised after final output check
UserError: invalid SDK usage (bad input filter return type, missing state, etc.)
ModelBehaviorError: malformed JSON from LLM or unexpected tool usage
ToolTimeoutError: function tool exceeded configured timeout with raise_exception behavior
important_notes: Runner is a static facade; AgentRunner is the real engine (experimental, not public API)
A 'turn' = one LLM invocation including all resulting tool calls
Input guardrails run only on turn 0 (first agent's guardrails + RunConfig.input_guardrails)
Parallel guardrails run concurrently with the first LLM call via asyncio.gather
Session persistence and server-managed conversation (conversation_id/previous_response_id) are mutually exclusive
run_streamed returns RunResultStreaming immediately; streaming events consumed via .stream_events()
RunState can be serialized and resumed — enables human-in-the-loop / durable execution
AgentHooks (per-agent) fire alongside RunHooks (run-level) for the same events
call_model_input_filter fires after session history merge but before LLM call
source_files_analyzed: docs/running_agents.md (domain terminology, loop description, config docs)
